# main

**Type Property**

The current device’s main screen.

## Declaration

```swift
class var main: XCUIScreen { get }
```

## Discussion

On macOS, [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreen/main] represents the screen that owns the menu bar. On iOS and tvOS, [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreen/main] represents the primary screen of the device.

## Device screens

- **screens**: The current device’s active screens.
title: main
